	 Pronunciation

	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Gāo Yí (Guànfāng)


	 Wade-Giles 
	Kao I (K‘uan-fang)

	 Name Notes 
	Courtesy name is sometime rendered as Guan’guang 貫光, Kuanfang 貫方 and Kuan’guang 貫光. Rafe de Crespigny mentions that Hong Kuo proffers that Guo Guanfang and Guo Guan’guang are two different person, likely brothers.

full_text:
Gao Yi (Guanfang) 高頤 (貫方)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Yi (高頤), styledGuanfang (貫方). Served Liu Zhang in civil roles and died in office. Gao Yi was affiliated with Liu Zhang. Gao Yi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
